overview.short: The Jagad Rakshaka Perumal Temple or Thirukoodalur (locally called Aduthurai Perumal Temple) in Vadakurangaduthurai, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam in the South Indian st
overview.description: The Jagad Rakshaka Perumal Temple or Thirukoodalur (locally called Aduthurai Perumal Temple) in Vadakurangaduthurai, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Jakath Rakshaka and his consort Lakshmi as Pushpavalli. The temple is believed to have been bui

topPlaces.name: Sthalasayana Perumal Temple, Tirusirupuliyur
topPlaces.description: Sthalasayana Perumal Temple (also called Arulmaakadal Perumal Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Vishnu located near Kollumangudi, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 2 km away from Kollumangudi, 17 km away from Mayiladuthurai and 10 km from Karaikal.

topPlaces.name: Sirupuliyur
topPlaces.description: Sirupuliyur is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Thiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The place is famous for the Sthalasayana Perumal Temple, a Hindu Temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Peralam
topPlaces.description: Peralam is a panchayat town in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tirumeeyachur Meganathar Temple (திருமீயச்சூர் மேகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Thirumeeyachur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva, called Meganathaswami.

topPlaces.name: Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple, is a Hindu temple situated at Kodiyalur near Peralam in Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur
topPlaces.description: The Subrahmanya Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Murugan located in the town of Perambur, 14 kilometres from Mayiladuthurai. The principal idol of Murugan has six faces.

topPlaces.name: Annadanapuram
topPlaces.description: Annadanapuram is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kilianur, Karaikal
topPlaces.description: Kilianur is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the north-west of Karaikal town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jakath Rakshaka Perumal Temple, Thirukkoodaloor.?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jakath Rakshaka Perumal Temple, Thirukkoodaloor. is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jakath Rakshaka Perumal Temple, Thirukkoodaloor.?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (108 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jakath Rakshaka Perumal Temple, Thirukkoodaloor.?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jakath Rakshaka Perumal Temple, Thirukkoodaloor. at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jakath Rakshaka Perumal Temple, Thirukkoodaloor.?
faq.a: Stays in Jakath Rakshaka Perumal Temple, Thirukkoodaloor. start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jakath Rakshaka Perumal Temple, Thirukkoodaloor.?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sthalasayana Perumal Temple, Tirusirupuliyur, Sirupuliyur, Peralam, Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple, Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple.
